purpose: G-aimed next-to-label pass: linear goodness field (T2_cells) ranks fresh v2-survivor windows. Slugs: uncertain (boundary-teaching) / top_g (precision audit) / control (uniform, confident-and-wrong audit).
candidate_source: dense-grid harvest over existing 30 fields (deduped vs the labeled batch) + fresh Newton minibrots
prefilter: v2 ceilings applied at construction (interior>=0.10 | flat>=0.88 | speckle_ratio>=0.30) -> all rows are survivors; no auto_filter_v2 needed.
separate_store: q4 window store; canonical reader tools/corpus/q4_window_reader.py.
